title: Syracuse Water Crews to Repair Water Main Leak on West Street on Sep 8
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water will repair a water main transmission line on West Street near Franklin Square on September 8, 2024. The repair will require street closures between Fayette and Washington Street, potentially causing water service disruptions and traffic delays in the area.
processing_notes: Author field listed as 'Unknown' in source metadata
No dollar amounts or budget impact specified
Street closure scope clearly defined (West St between Fayette-Washington, Washington St between Franklin-West)
Contact number provided for constituent inquiries: (315) 448-8360
Accessibility consideration noted: sidewalks remain open
This is a routine maintenance announcement with public impact notification
